narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Wood County) has 1,187 registered voters, with 43.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
